steps.title: Add a second mandate
steps.content: The first sentence explains one requirement of the Twentieth Amendment: presidential inaugurations on January 20. The next sentence introduces another requirement from the same amendment: newly elected senators and representatives are sworn in on January 3.

steps.title: Reject contrast and examples
steps.content: Choice A would signal substitution, as if the second requirement replaced the first. Choice B would make congressional swearing-in an example of presidential inauguration, and Choice C would make it a more specific version of that same mandate. The relationship is addition. The answer is D.
